title: T-077 — TO actuals inventory/location/shelf-life non-conformance trigger contract
prompt:
# T-077 — TO actuals inventory/location/shelf-life non-conformance trigger contract

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §0, §5.1A, §9.4
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Technical-side TO actuals non-conformance boundary contract without spec/BOM/cost mutation.

This task documents and enforces the boundary. If warehouse/inventory tables are absent, use event/outbox assertions and immutable master-data fixtures. Non-conformance ownership can be Quality event until 09-QUALITY schema exists. No app UI in this task. Non-conformance emission must use the shared contract from T-082 when present; until 09-QUALITY exists, persist/emit the exact outbox event shape defined there.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/technical/to-actuals-review.ts [create]
- apps/web/events/handlers/to-transfer-actual-recorded.ts [create]
- tests/integration/technical/to-actuals-review.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given transfer actual has shelf-life below FG requirement, then SHELF_LIFE_TOO_SHORT non-conformance is emitted and factory_specs/BOM/supplier_specs/cost are unchanged.
2. Given transfer actual has location not allowed for allergen segregation, then LOCATION_NOT_ALLOWED is emitted with lot/location references.
3. Given event retries with same idempotency key, then no duplicate non-conformance is created.
4. Given transfer actual proposes spec-like attributes, then handler ignores them and records boundary violation for review.
5. Given a variance is classified from to.transfer_actual_recorded, then emitted non_conformance.requested payload conforms to T-082 and includes source_event_id, idempotency_key, source_module, entity refs, reason codes and severity.

## Test strategy
- RED integration test with immutable master-data snapshots around handler.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/integration/technical/to-actuals-review.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement warehouse transfer logic.
- Do not mutate Technical master data from TO actuals.
- Do not own Quality investigation workflow.
- Do not invent a PO/TO-specific NCR payload that diverges from T-082.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
